title: Business Development Executive / Senior Business Development Executive (Freight Forwarding)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Business Development / Sales professional with a proven background in the freight forwarding and logistics industry to grow our customer base and develop long-term business relationships.

This role focuses on new business acquisition, key account development, and end-to-end logistics solutions across sea freight, air freight, and local transportation services.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and acquire new customers in freight forwarding and logistics

  • Manage and grow existing key accounts

  • Promote company services including:

    • Sea Freight (FCL / LCL)

    • Air Freight

    • Cross-border & local transportation

    • Project / specialized cargo (if applicable)

  • Prepare and follow up on quotations and proposals

  • Conduct client visits, sales calls, and presentations

  • Work closely with operations and pricing teams to ensure smooth execution

  • Monitor market trends, competitor activity, and customer requirements

  • Achieve assigned sales targets and GP objectives

Requirements

Mandatory Experience

  • Minimum 2–3 years of sales / business development experience in the freight forwarding or logistics industry

  • Strong understanding of incoterms, freight pricing, and logistics workflows

Skills & Competencies

  • Proven track record in hunting new customers

  • Strong negotiation, communication, and presentation skills

  • Self-motivated, result-oriented, and able to work independently

  • Familiar with Singapore logistics market and trade lanes

Other Requirements

  • Diploma / Degree in Logistics, Supply Chain, Business, or related field

  • Own transport is an advantage (if applicable)

postedCompany.description:
About Us

Founded in 2015, NKY started out as a local transportation company with one commercial van. We had since expanded our fleet and expanded our capabilities to freight forwarding and warehousing. Today our logistical network and services are focused on key industries sectors such as Semiconductors, Healthcare & Pharmaceuticals, IT infrastructure and Equipment, Fashion Retail. 


Mission Statement

We want to establish ourselves as the preferred logistics service provider through digitalisation and robust logistics network with prominent presence in Southeast Asia.


Vision Statement

“To connect businesses by creating unprecedented value with our logistical solutions.”


Our Values

Audacity. Commitment. Excellence.
postedCompany.name: NKY FREIGHT FORWARDING PTE. LTD.
